texto: The striking point about our model family is not simply the compete-compete consume-consume style of life it urges us to follow. The striking point in the face of all the propaganda is how few Americans actually live this way.
explicacao: Citação de Louise Kapp Howe sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The striking point about our model family is not simply the compete-compete consume-consume style…” articula reflexao, side, striking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
